claim.statement: Provide keyboard shortcuts and accelerators for frequent expert workflows so power users can work keyboard-first, which is materially faster than mouse-driven operation. Shortcuts should be discoverable, documented, and avoid clobbering native browser/AT bindings.

limitations: Benefit concentrates in high-frequency expert tasks; over-binding can conflict with assistive tech

do: Offer accelerators for the highest-frequency actions (navigate, create, search, submit)
Expose a shortcuts reference (e.g. ? overlay) and show hints in menus
Allow customisation or remapping where conflicts arise
avoid: Overriding reserved browser or screen-reader key combinations
Hiding shortcuts so only insiders know they exist
